The Golden State Warriors traded cash and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Alessandro Gentile was later selected) to the Minnesota Timberwolves for Malcolm Lee and Andre Roberson .
The Golden State Warriors traded Andre Roberson to the Oklahoma City Thunder for Archie Goodwin and cash.

The Cleveland Cavaliers traded Allen Crabbe to the Portland Trail Blazers for a 2015 2nd round draft pick ( Sir'Dominic Pointer was later selected) and a 2016 2nd round draft pick ( Paul Zipser was later selected).

The Boston Celtics traded Lucas Nogueira , a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Cleanthony Early was later selected) and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Russ Smith was later selected) to the Dallas Mavericks for Kelly Olynyk .
The Atlanta Hawks traded Shane Larkin and cash to the Dallas Mavericks for Jared Cunningham , Mike Muscala and Lucas Nogueira .
The Denver Nuggets traded Rudy Gobert to the Utah Jazz for Erick Green and cash.
The Golden State Warriors traded Archie Goodwin and Malcolm Lee to the Phoenix Suns for Nemanja Nedović .
The Philadelphia 76ers traded Glen Rice Jr. to the Washington Wizards for Arsalan Kazemi and Nate Wolters .
The Oklahoma City Thunder traded cash to the Portland Trail Blazers for Grant Jerrett .
The Atlanta Hawks traded James Ennis to the Miami Heat for a 2017 2nd round draft pick ( Sterling Brown was later selected).
The Boston Celtics traded cash to the Indiana Pacers for Colton Iverson .
The Denver Nuggets traded Kosta Koufos to the Memphis Grizzlies for Darrell Arthur and Joffrey Lauvergne .
The Dallas Mavericks traded a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Russ Smith was later selected) to the Philadelphia 76ers for Ricky Ledo .
The Atlanta Hawks traded Raul Neto to the Utah Jazz for a 2015 2nd round draft pick ( Pat Connaughton was later selected).
The Memphis Grizzlies hired David Joerger as Head Coach.
The Milwaukee Bucks traded Ricky Ledo and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Nemanja Dangubić was later selected) to the Philadelphia 76ers for Nate Wolters .
The Los Angeles Lakers waived Chris Duhon .
The Phoenix Suns waived Hamed Haddadi .
The Boston Celtics waived Terrence Williams .
The Houston Rockets waived Aaron Brooks .
The Houston Rockets waived Carlos Delfino .

The New York Knicks waived James White .
